source: Isaac Lab RSL-RL PPO, task Isaac-Velocity-Flat-RobotDog-v0, 1500 iters, GB10

verified.note: tracks commanded base velocity within 0.04 m/s, never fell

obs_frame_note: base_lin_vel/base_ang_vel are in the ROBOT BASE frame (not world). On hardware, get these from an IMU expressed in the base frame. projected_gravity = gravity unit vector rotated into the base frame.
remap_note: ONNX obs joint sub-vectors (joint_pos_rel, joint_vel, prev_action) must be supplied in joint_order_isaac; the 12 action outputs are also in joint_order_isaac. To send to the ESP32 (servo_map.json channel order = joint_order_deploy), reorder: deploy[k] = isaac[isaac_to_deploy_index[k]]. To build the obs joint sub-vectors from per-leg/servo-order state: isaac[k] = deploy[deploy_to_isaac_index[k]].
